API docs by Redocly

Wodby 2 Public API (1.0.0)

Download OpenAPI specification:

License: Proprietary Terms of Service

Public REST API for customer SDKs and code integrations. GraphQL remains internal for the dashboard. This contract is the versioned public surface.

orgs

Organizations that own projects, resources, and access scopes.

List orgs

Authorizations:
apiKeyHeader

Responses

/v1/orgs

Response samples

  • 200
  • default
  • 4XX
Content type
application/json
[
  • {
    • "id": 0,
    • "name": "string",
    • "title": "string",
    • "domain": "string",
    • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
    • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
    }
]

apiKeyHeader
path Parameters
id
required
integer

projects

Project containers within organizations.

List projects

Authorizations:
apiKeyHeader
query Parameters
orgId
integer

Optional for API-key requests; defaults to the API key's organization. If provided, it must match the key's organization.

Responses

/v1/projects

Response samples

  • 200
  • default
  • 4XX
Content type
application/json
[
  • {
    • "id": 0,
    • "name": "string",
    • "title": "string",
    • "orgId": 0,
    • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
    • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
    }
]

Create project

Authorizations:
apiKeyHeader
Request Body schema: application/json
required
orgId
integer

Optional for API-key requests; defaults to the API key's organization.

name
required
string
title
required
string
teamIds
Array of integers
orgMembershipIds
Array of integers
role
string

apps

Applications and app-level configuration.

List apps

Authorizations:
apiKeyHeader
query Parameters
orgId
integer

Optional for API-key requests; defaults to the API key's organization. If provided, it must match the key's organization.

projectIds
string

Comma-separated project ids

clusterApp
boolean

Responses

/v1/apps

Response samples

  • 200
  • default
  • 4XX
Content type
application/json
[
  • {
    • "id": 0,
    • "name": "string",
    • "title": "string",
    • "status": "string",
    • "clusterApp": true,
    • "orgId": 0,
    • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
    • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
    }
]

Create app

Authorizations:
apiKeyHeader
Request Body schema: application/json
required
orgId
integer

Optional for API-key requests; defaults to the API key's organization.

name
required
string
title
required
string
instanceName
required
string
instanceTitle
required
string
domain
required
string
projectId
integer or null
stackRevId
required
integer
required
Array of objects (NewAppServiceInput)
clusterId
integer or null
object (NewManagedClusterInput)
envId
required
integer
ciIntegrationId
integer or null
registryIntegrationId
integer or null

Responses

/v1/apps

  • Payload
Content type
application/json

        • {

            • 0
            ]
          }
        ],

        • {
          • "name": "string",
          • "value": "string"
          }
        ],
      • "database": {
        • "databaseId": 0,
        • "databaseDbId": 0
        },
      • "resources": {
        • "workload": "string",
        • "container": "string",

        },

        • "averageCPU": 0,
        • "minReplicas": 0,
        • "maxReplicas": 0
        }

    ],
  • "clusterId": 0,
  • "newCluster": {
    • "demo": true,
    • "singleNode": true,
    • "region": "string",
    • "machineType": "string",
    • "minNodeCount": 0,
    • "maxNodeCount": 0
    },

  • "ciIntegrationId": 0,
  • "registryIntegrationId": 0
}

app-instances

Deployable application instances.

Authorizations:
apiKeyHeader
query Parameters
orgId
integer

Optional for API-key requests; defaults to the API key's organization. If provided, it must match the key's organization.

projectIds
string

Comma-separated project ids

appId
integer
clusterId
integer
clusterApp
boolean

Responses

/v1/app-instances

Response samples

  • 200
  • default
  • 4XX
Content type
application/json
[
  • {
    • "id": 0,
    • "name": "string",
    • "title": "string",
    • "status": "string",
    • "mainDomain": "string",
    • "appId": 0,
    • "clusterId": 0,
    • "envId": 0,

    • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
    }
]

apiKeyHeader

required
appId

app-deployments

Deployment records and deployment actions.

List app deployments

Authorizations:
apiKeyHeader
query Parameters
appInstanceId
required
integer
page
integer >= 1

Page number, defaults to 1

pageSize
integer >= 1

Page size, defaults to 30

Responses

/v1/app-deployments

Response samples

  • 200
  • default
  • 4XX
Content type
application/json
{
  • "items": [
    • {
      • "id": 0,
      • "number": 0,
      • "status": "string",
      • "skipRollback": true,
      • "appInstanceId": 0,
      • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "startedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "endedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
      }
    ],
  • "totalCount": 0,
  • "nextPage": 0
}

Create deployment

Authorizations:
apiKeyHeader
Request Body schema: application/json
required
required
Array of objects (AppServiceDeploymentRequest)
skipRollback
boolean or null

Responses

/v1/app-deployments

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "services": [
    • {
      • "appServiceId": 0,
      • "appServiceBuildId": 0,
      • "skipPostDeployment": true,
      • "force": true
      }
    ],
  • "skipRollback": true
}

Response samples

  • 201
  • default
  • 4XX
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": 0,
  • "number": 0,
  • "status": "string",
  • "skipRollback": true,
  • "appInstanceId": 0,

  • "startedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "endedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
}

Create deployment from CI

Authorizations:
apiKeyHeaderciAccessTokenHeader
Request Body schema: application/json
required
appBuildId
required
integer
required
Array of objects (ServiceDeploymentInput)
skipPostDeployment
required
boolean

Responses

/v1/app-deployments/from-ci

Content type
application/json

      • "name": "string",
      • "image": "string"
      }
    ],
  • "skipPostDeployment": true
}

app-builds

apiKeyHeader
query Parameters
appInstanceId
required
integer

integer >= 1

pageSize
integer >= 1

Page size, defaults to 30

  • default
  • 4XX

application/json

clusters

Kubernetes clusters connected to or managed by Wodby.

apiKeyHeader
query Parameters
orgId
integer

Optional for API-key requests; defaults to the API key's organization. If provided, it must match the key's organization.

projectIds
string

Comma-separated project ids

integrationId
integer

  • 200
  • default
  • 4XX

application/json
[

    • "version": "string",

    • "zone": "string",
    • "integrationId": 0,

    • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
    }
]

apiKeyHeader
Request Body schema: application/json
required
orgId
integer

integer or null

required
integer
name
required
string
title
required
string
serverless
required
boolean
singleNode
boolean or null

string or null
machineType
string or null
minNodeCount
integer or null
maxNodeCount
integer or null

integer or null

string or null

string or null

string or null

boolean

      • "endedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
      }
    ],

envs

Organization-level environment definitions.

List envs

Authorizations:
apiKeyHeader
query Parameters
orgId
integer

Optional for API-key requests; defaults to the API key's organization. If provided, it must match the key's organization.

Responses

/v1/envs

Response samples

  • 200
  • default
  • 4XX
Content type
application/json

  • {

    • "orgId": 0,
    • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
    • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
    }
]
